Boxer Crab & Sea Anemone: Nature's Partnership

🦀✨ **Pom-pom Crab (Lybia tessellata)** ✨🦀 This tiny crustacean takes accessorizing to the next level! The **Pom-pom crab**, also known as the **boxer crab**, carries living sea anemones in its claws like fuzzy pom-poms 🎀. But these aren't just for show — the crab waves them as both weapons and shields. The anemones pack a sting that keeps predators at bay ⚡, while the crab provides them with mobility and food scraps in return. A perfect little partnership 🤝. Found in tropical reefs, this cra
